ddt:Target.Name: ADAS_ECU_C1A_V9_1
ddt:Target.Description:
Generic database for UDS specification ---------------------------------------------------------------
Based on specifications: -------------------------------------- 36 - 00 - 011 - Unified Diagnostic Services (UDS) Implementation. 36 - 02 - 014 - Rules for the management of on-board reference numbers in UDS implementation.
History : ------------ v 1.2 : 2011-04-20 : Switch English v 1.1 : 2011-02-01 : Laurent TRABATTONI / Olivier BAUX: Sce 65676 : Modification for OutputControl v 1.0 : 2010-09-30 : Laurent TRABATTONI : Sce 65676 : Initial release
******************************************************************************** PLEASE READ CAREFULLY ********************************************************************************
Note: -------- In specifications (Renault, ISO) the word RESERVED means : DO NOT USE !
DO NOT COPY ALL REQUESTS/DATA/DEVICES from this database : You should only import items that are specified in the ECU.
Requests: ---------------- TesterPresent.WithResponse : this request IS MANDATORY. It is used by DDT2000 to know that the ECU is UDS compliant. Requests 22EFxx should be copied only if your ECU is concerned by the specified information. Requests 22EFxx should be modified after copy (length, etc...) because they depend of "Communication Requirement Specification" ReadMemoryByAddress : You should select one of the pre-defined requests (depending of the ECU specifications).
Data: -------- Data OutputPermanentControlList : you should define the list of IO control to the ECU needs. Data DTCDeviceIdentifier : update the list to the ECU needs.
Devices: ------------- Update list to the ECU needs
Data Identifiers: ------------------------ Range F010 - F0FF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT. Range F1A0 - F1EF is reserved for the diagnostic departement needs. DO NOT USE WITHOUT DIAGNOSTIC DEPARTMENT AGREEMENT.

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: applicationDataIdentification
Data.Comment: Calibration Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application data identification record.

The format of the application data identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: applicationSoftwareIdentification
Data.Comment: Software Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application software number(s).

The format of the application software identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Comment: ECU serial number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer order number for a kit (assembled parts bought as a whole for production e.g. cockpit), when the spare part number designates only the server (e.g. for aftersales).

The record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Vehicle Identification Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: exhaustRegulationOrTypeApprovalNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the exhaust regulation or type approval number (valid for those systems which require type approval).

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemNameOrEngineType
Data.Comment: System name or engine type
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system name or engine type.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Comment: VDIAG
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: programmingOperationFingerPrint
Data.Comment: Only for programmable ECU
Data.Description:
The value is written by the ECU when executing the SendKey SecurityAccess service

The value can be read in boot loader mode.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Comment: Software Version (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineStatusRecord.RoutineInfo
Data.Comment: Routine information

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.16bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.24bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 24 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.32bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 32 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemorySize.8bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 8 bits length for memory size

Data.Name: MemorySize.16bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits length for memory size

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: IOCTL.StatusRecord.Parameter
Data.Comment: Input Output control status

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Comment: Routine identifier received in the reply of the RoutineControl request

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: OutputControlCommand
Data.Comment: Input Output control parameter list

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: DTCFaultDetectionCounter
Data.Comment: DTC fault detction counter

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Data.Name: DID_Wiper.Speed.value
Data.Comment: This is an example data for InputOutputControl request. See IOCTL.DataIdentifierList documentation.

Data.Name: DID_DisplayedTemperature.value
Data.Comment: This is an example data for InputOutputControl request. See IOCTL.DataIdentifierList documentation.

Data.Name: DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: MILEAGE_SNAPSHOT.Mileage DTC first occurrence
Data.Comment: Mileage at First appearance of risen DTC, same coding as Mileage of the last occurrence counter

Data.Name: MILEAGE_SNAPSHOT.Mileage DTC last occurrence
Data.Comment: Mileage at last appearance of the same risen DTC, same coding as Mileage of the last occurrence coun

Data.Name: MILEAGE_SNAPSHOT.Mileage DTC last disapear
Data.Comment: Number of km since last disapearance (switch from present to Memorized) of the failure

Data.Name: MILEAGE_SNAPSHOT.TCTravelDistanceFailurePresent
Data.Comment: Number of km since last disapearance (switch from present to Memorized) of the failure

Data.Name: DID_ACU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE
Data.Comment: xxxxxxxx xxxxxxxx xxxxxxxx xxxxxxx1 : ACU is present in the vehicle definition

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataRead.applicationDataIdentification
Request.Comment: Read applicationDataIdentification

Request.Name: DataRead.vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Request.Comment: Read vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber

Request.Name: DataRead.systemSupplierIdentifier
Request.Comment: Read systemSupplierIdentifier

Request.Name: DataRead.ECUSerialNumber
Request.Comment: Read ECUSerialNumber

Request.Name: DataRead.vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber
Request.Comment: Read vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber

Request.Name: DataRead.VIN
Request.Comment: Read VIN

Request.Name: DataRead.vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Request.Comment: Read vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber

Request.Name: DataRead.systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Request.Comment: Read systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber

Request.Name: DataRead.diagnosticVersion
Request.Comment: Read diagnosticVersion

Request.Name: DataRead.programmingOperationFingerPrint
Request.Comment: Read programmingOperationFingerPrint

Request.Name: DataRead.CANV_Diagmux
Request.Comment: CAN vehicle network status - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANMM_Diagmux_85
Request.Comment: CAN multimedia network status - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANMM_Diagmux_86
Request.Comment: CAN multimedia network status - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANLSFT_Diagmux
Request.Comment: CAN LSFT network status - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANEL_Diagmux
Request.Comment: CAN electrotech network status - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.LINRLSW_Diagmux
Request.Comment: LIN network status - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.LINDOOR_Diagmux
Request.Comment: LIN network status - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.LINEVC_Diagmux
Request.Comment: LIN network status - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.LINBATT_Diagmux
Request.Comment: LIN network status - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.LINALT_Diagmux
Request.Comment: LIN network status - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANADAS_Diagmux
Request.Comment: CAN ADAS network status - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CAN_multi_Diagmux
Request.Comment: multi CAN network status - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers. (Nissan company)

Request.Name: DataRead.CANV_EcuList
Request.Comment: CAN vehicle ECU list - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANV_DiagEcuList
Request.Comment: CAN vehicle diagnosable ECU list - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANMM_EcuList
Request.Comment: CAN multimedia ECU list - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANMM_DiagEcuList
Request.Comment: CAN multimedia diagnosable ECU list - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANLSFT_EcuList
Request.Comment: CAN LSFT ECU list - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANLSFT_DiagEcuList
Request.Comment: CAN multimedia diagnosable ECU list - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANEL_EcuList
Request.Comment: CAN electrotech ECU list - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANEL_DiagEcuList
Request.Comment: CAN multimedia diagnosable ECU list - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANADAS_EcuList
Request.Comment: CAN ADAS ECU list - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: DataRead.CANADAS_DiagEcuList
Request.Comment: CAN multimedia diagnosable ECU list - see "Communication Requirement Specification" file from manufacturer ECU designers.

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportNumberOfDTCByStatusMask
Request.Comment: Report number of DTC

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC

Request.Name: ReportDTCInformation.ReportDTCFaultDetectionCounter
Request.Comment: Report DTC fault detection

Request.Name: RoutineControl
Request.Comment: You should remove ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.xxx data. These are examples.

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.32x8
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 32 bits and data length coded on 8 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.32x16
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 32 bits and data length coded on 16 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.24x8
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 24 bits and data length coded on 8 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.24x16
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 24 bits and data length coded on 16 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.16x8
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 16 bits and data length coded on 8 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.16x16
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 16 bits and data length coded on 16 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.Generic
Request.Comment: Generic Read Memory By Address

Request.Name: OutputControl
Request.Comment: Input Output Control

Request.Name: OutputControl.Start.DID_DisplayedTemperature
Request.Comment: Input Output Control - Example

Request.Name: OutputControl.Stop
Request.Comment: Input Output Control

Request.Name: OutputControl.Start.DID_Cobra
Request.Comment: Input Output Control - Example

Request.Name: DataRead.secutity accessFingerPrint
Request.Comment: Read security access FingerPrint

Request.Name: DataRead.vehicleManufacturerECUSoftwareNumber
Request.Comment: Read autoconfigurationFingerPrint

Request.Name: DataRead.systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Request.Comment: Read systemSupplierECUVersionNumber

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTCSnapshotIdentification
Request.Comment: Report snapshot identification

Request.Name: ReportDTCInformation.ReportDTCFaultDetectionCounter_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report DTC fault detection counter counter for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip
